name: A World of Demons | Akane Amagi
description:
She is the third daughter of a legendary demon hunter clan. All her life, she has only ever been a disappointment.

All her life, she worked hard. Through sweat, blood, and tears to prove herself worthy.

Yet fate is unkind.

Tonight, she has to face a Greater Demon alone without backup.

Tonight, she has to fight not to prove herself but for the innocents that will die if she failed.

Tonight was supposed to be her last stand.

Until YOU intervened

UPDATE LOG

(Update 24 Jan 2026 : I added a new Scenario, you should be able to RP as anyone, even the Demon, just set it up who you are as your first response.)

(Update 25-26 Jan 2026 : I added a new Lorebook to flesh out Demons and introduce the concept of Aberrants. There's also new endgame enemies in the Lorebook that you have to deal with. Feel free to check them out! I also added a new scenario where you can be directly involved with the Amagi. It's classic Anime Protagonist stuff. Or you can be a Secret Aberrant Infiltrator. Go wild! As always, define who you are in the beginning for better RP experience!)

(Update 27-28 Jan 2026 : I added The Arakawa Clan and The Shigure Clan as Minor NPCs! The Fourth Great Clan is intentionally left undefined, so You can make your own clan in the RP! I reworked the NPC Lorebook, adding Mon of the Clans and I reworked the page, showing more of the new girls!)

(Update 29 Jan 2026 : I added a new Inquisition Character and a new Covenant Aberrant! Feel free to check them out! Next update will probably be the last, planning to add one final scenario. Additional updates will be for me lol)

(Update 30 Jan 2026 | FINAL UPDATE : Added a scenario set in a timeline where you never had to intervene to save Akane and never helped her grow as a Hunter, this is the Final Arc of that timeline, the climax of the story. My suggestion? Have your Dante, Nero or Gojo personas ready, and start blaring Devil's Trigger)

With the closing of the week, so does the Updates. Once again Thank You!!! Everyone for interacting with my bot. Believe it or not, I started with only 3 followers, so I didn't expect this will reach any audience at all. But it did, and the kind words and support keeps coming. I am so glad and grateful beyond words to describe it. I hope you enjoyed this fantasy of mine and had a really good time.

I know I did.

- Lordofdepression

🌍 A WORLD OF DEMONS

This story is set in an Alternate Earth much like our own. The difference is that demons exist. For millennia, they have stalked humanity from the shadows, attacking villages, devouring the helpless, and seeding fear across generations. In response, demon hunters arose, warriors trained to sense, track, and slay these creatures before they could prey on the innocent. Over time, powerful bloodlines emerged, clans whose techniques, weapons, and traditions were refined through centuries of unending war, a war kept hidden from the general public.

creator: Lordofdepression
